description:
A Beckn schema for food and beverage offer attributes.

FnBOffer extends beckn:RetailCoreOfferAttributes with F&B-specific offer
customization groups — the structured mechanism by which a food item's
configurable options (size, crust, toppings, add-ons) are declared and
priced within an offer.

A CustomizationGroup represents one dimension of configurability (e.g.
pizza size, crust type, topping selection). Each group has one or more
options with optional price deltas.

Inheritance: beckn:RetailCoreOfferAttributes ← beckn:FnBOffer
Use in: beckn:Offer.offerAttributes for F&B catalog items
title: FnBOffer

@context.description: JSON-LD context URI for the FnBOffer schema.

customization.description: Structured customization configuration for this offer. Groups represent independent dimensions of configurability.

groups.description: List of customization groups for this offer.

CustomizationGroup.description: A single dimension of configurability for a food item offer. Examples: pizza size selection, crust type, topping selection, add-on selection, sauce choice.

code.description: Machine-readable code for this customization group (e.g. SIZE, CRUST, TOPPINGS, ADDONS, SAUCE).

name.description: Human-readable name for this customization group.

selection.description: Selection mode for this group. - SINGLE_REQUIRED: Exactly one option must be chosen (e.g. pizza size) - SINGLE_OPTIONAL: Zero or one option may be chosen - MULTIPLE_OPTIONAL: Zero or more options may be chosen (e.g. toppings)

minSelections.description: Minimum number of options that must be selected (for MULTIPLE_OPTIONAL).

maxSelections.description: Maximum number of options that may be selected (for MULTIPLE_OPTIONAL).

options.description: Available options within this customization group.

CustomizationOption.description: A single selectable option within a CustomizationGroup. Each option may carry a price delta (positive or negative) relative to the base offer price.

code.description: Machine-readable option code (e.g. MEDIUM, CHEESE_BURST, MUSHROOM).

priceDelta.description: Incremental price change relative to the base offer price when this option is selected. Positive for upcharges, negative for discounts.

type.description: - FIXED: Absolute price change in the offer currency - PERCENTAGE: Percentage change of the base price

value.description: Amount of the price change (positive or negative).

itemRef.description: Optional reference to a catalog Item ID for this option.

offerRef.description: Optional reference to another Offer ID (for combo sub-offers).

available.description: Whether this option is currently available for selection.
